security.csp: default-src 'self' tauri: asset:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset:; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: System monitoring dashboard built with Rust and Tauri
bundle.longDescription: A native cross-platform system monitoring dashboard with real-time CPU, memory, disk, and network monitoring, process management, detachable panels, and a menu bar tray popup.
